ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the racing course */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of spectators the course can hold */,
  "track_length" INTEGER /* Length of the racing track */,
  "track_surface" TEXT /* Surface type of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the racing event */,
  "course" TEXT /* Name of the racing course */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of racing event (e.g., CHASE, HURDLE) */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance of the racing event */,
  "going" TEXT /* Going conditions of the racing event (e.g., Soft, Good) */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class of the racing event */,
  "starting_price" TEXT /* Starting price of the favorite horse */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing event */,
  "prize_money" TEXT /* Total prize money for the event */,
  "number_of_runners" INTEGER /* Number of horses participating in the event */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_course FOREIGN KEY ("course") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the horse */,
  "sire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse's sire */,
  "dam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse's dam */,
  "breeder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse's breeder */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse's owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_sire_id FOREIGN KEY ("sire_id") REFERENCES sires ("sire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_dam_id FOREIGN KEY ("dam_id") REFERENCES dams ("dam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_breeder_id FOREIGN KEY ("breeder_id") REFERENCES breeders ("breeder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jockeys" (
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jockey */,
  "jockey_name" TEXT /* Name of the jockey */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the jockey in years */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the jockey */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the jockey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jockey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the trainer in years */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the trainer */,
  "yard_location" TEXT /* Location of the trainer's yard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racing event */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse participating in the event */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey riding the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer of the horse */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Finishing position of the horse */,
  "starting_price" TEXT /* Starting price of the horse */,
  "draw_number" INTEGER /* Draw number of the horse */,
  "barrier_number" INTEGER /* Barrier number of the horse */,
  "winning_time" TEXT /* Time taken by the horse to complete the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds" (
  "odd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting odd */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racing event */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "odds" TEXT /* Betting odds for the horse */,
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmaker offering the odds */,
  "odds_type" TEXT /* Type of odds (e.g., win, place) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_bookmaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmaker_id") REFERENCES bookmakers ("bookmaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breeders" (
  "breeder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breeder */,
  "breeder_name" TEXT /* Name of the breeder */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the breeder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breeder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmakers" (
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmaker */,
  "bookmaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the bookmaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sires" (
  "sire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sire */,
  "sire_name" TEXT /* Name of the sire */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the sire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dams" (
  "dam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dam */,
  "dam_name" TEXT /* Name of the dam */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the dam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dam_id")
)
